description: You are the Senior Clinical Data Manager responsible for QAing the 'ONC-2025' study build before it goes live. Using the credentials root / Admin123!, ensure 'ONC-2025' is the active study and correct the configuration errors in OpenClinica. Update the study phase to 'Phase II', set the 'Baseline Visit' event definition to be non-repeating, and change the 'Adverse Event Report' event type to 'Unscheduled'. Additionally, update the Event-CRF matrix by removing the 'Demographics' CRF assignment from the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event and assigning the 'Vital Signs' CRF to the 'Screening Visit' event.
